Name: Santander Pirates
Description: Santander V, also known as Santander's World, is the capital world of a bandit kingdom. All outlaws in this region pay homage to the Pirate King, Helmar Valasek.
ReputationStatements: Don't make me chase you across the Periphery if this goes badly. That's a lot of fuel.
Let's try not to disappoint each other. Mostly me.
Normally I'd trust our own crews with this, but they're all busy causing trouble elsewhere.
The target thinks nobody can reach them way out here. I love proving people wrong.
You mercenaries always look so serious. It's honestly a little worrying.
You're fun to work with! Competent too, which is even rarer out here.
You know your company’s becoming a pirate legend along the northern frontier? Let's get a drink!
MissionSuccessStatements: Ha! Perfect. Nobody exploded that wasn't supposed to.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Sometimes fortune decides she's got other plans.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Wait, you left? That was your plan?
